items.project_definition: RESTful interface versioned under /api/v1/ employing a standardized response envelope containing data, meta, and error fields.
The httpx non-blocking request handler utilized within pytest for executing integration tests.
The persistent storage layer requiring strictly non-blocking access patterns.
Sectional identifier for the security and permissions governance rules.

items.contextual_anchor: III. API Contract and Response Shape
items.project_definition: Sectional identifier for the communication protocol and data exchange format.
Sectional identifier for the storage interaction and migration constraints.
The required lightweight data-interchange format for all network responses.
Compact, URL-safe means of representing claims to be informationally exchanged, configured with a 15-minute access and 7-day refresh lifespan.
The timestamp marking the final modification of the technical governance document.
The exclusive abstraction layer for mapping object-oriented code to relational tables, prohibiting direct query execution.
The relational database engine version 16 used for both production and testing environments.
The mandatory runtime environment version for all backend implementation.
The official Resend Python library used for transactional email dispatch.
The structured query language whose raw execution is strictly forbidden in favor of the abstraction layer.
The database toolkit used for async execution and relational mapping.
